content.text: Uptober is finally here! What an exciting time! I hope everyone here makes a lot of money in the next few months!

It's a meme, a joke, why are we considering it as a form of payment...
Doge coins will be one of the accepted payment tools alongside the credit cards for Musk's robotaxi once launched.
